[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a person’s face with a purple-and-yellow filter and overlaid text across the lower portion of the image.  

Main Subject:  
A person is shown from the front in a tight, cropped shot, with their face filling most of the frame. The person has short dark hair, dark eyebrows, and appears to be wearing a dark top; the face is tinted with a semi-transparent purple area and a lighter yellowish tone over portions of the cheeks and lower face, giving the image a stylized, color-inverted or diagnostic-like look.  

Setting:  
The background is unclear and out of focus, showing indoor-like lighting and indistinct shapes, with no clear location details. The lighting appears soft and even.  

Visual Details:  
The image is heavily edited with strong color overlays: purple dominates the forehead and around the cheeks, and warm yellow tones appear in the mid-to-lower face. The person’s eyes are visible and directed toward the camera. The composition is a tight crop of the face with the head near the top center, and the text is placed at the bottom in large, bold, white uppercase letters on a dark band.  

Visible Text:  
KLIHATAN ASIK YH  

Practical Summary:  
The image displays a close-up of a person’s face with a purple and yellow color overlay effect. Large bold white text reading “KLIHATAN ASIK YH” appears across the bottom of the image.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
